title: PaymentMethodTypeValues
description: Specifies the transfer method that will be used to transfer the cash. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cheque
x-enumeration-literals.description: Written order to a bank to pay a certain amount of money from one person to another person.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CreditTransfer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transfer of an amount of money in the books of the account servicer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: DirectDebit
x-enumeration-literals.description: Collection of an amount of money from the debtor's bank account by the creditor. The amount of money and dates of collections may vary.

x-enumeration-literals.name: TransferAdvice
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transfer of an amount of money in the books of the account servicer. An advice should be sent back to the account owner.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Invoice
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Invoice (Manual Payment): The customer is issued an invoice and is responsible for making the payment.

Comment:
Payment is typically done via:
Bank transfer
Online payment
Cash or cheque

x-enumeration-literals.name: Internal Account Debit
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Funds are debited directly from another account within the same institution.

Comment:
Example: deducting fees from a customers savings or current account.
